page_content:
Formerly: BUMK758J.

BUMK774 Market Forecasting (2 Credits)

Market forecasting methods for different contexts. Focus on quantitative modeling techniques based on established statistical methods. Non- statistical methods used when empirical data is scarce. This is a very hands-on class where students will apply the forecasting methods learned to real data.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUMK758A or BUMK774.
